snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Che Guevara, taistelija - TLDRDEEP
snippet.description:
Ernesto "Che" Guevara on nimi, joka on käytännössä kaikille tuttu, mutta mistä jäbä maineensa oikein niitti? Toisten sankari ja toisten vihollinen. Tässä jaksossa paneudumme miehen elämään, josta tuli legenda jo eläessään.

#cheguevara #sissijohtaja #vallankumous

- Yle Areenassa: https://areena.yle.fi/audio/1-50626011

snippet.title: Mortal Kombat (2021) - Official Red Band Trailer
snippet.description:
The Mortal Kombat movie reboot from director Simon McQuoid features the defenders of Earthrealm Liu Kang, Sonya Blade, Jax Briggs and more entering the Mortal Kombat tournament to save the world from Shang Tsung, Sub-Zero, Mileena and other supernatural kombatants.

This red band Mortal Kombat (2021) trailer shows off why it's rated R.

Mortal Kombat movie release date April 16, 2021.

snippet.title: Kylmä yö lumikammissa

snippet.title: Näin Taiwan on torjunut koronan
snippet.description:
Tässä reportaasini eturintamalta, jossa pandemia on torjuttu varsin mallikkaasti. Videolla esittelen ensin kaupungin, jonne olen jo ehtinyt asettua ja sitten perehdyn pandemian vaikutuksiin ja sitä vastaan käytyihin toimenpiteisiin. Soitan myös suomalaiselle asiantuntijalle, joka kertoo miksi Suomen tilanne ei ole yhtä hyvä kuin Taiwanissa. 

HUSin diagnostiikkajohtaja Lasse Lehtosen koko haastattelu löytyy täältä: https://youtu.be/e5fPQteI2K4

snippet.title: Tuukka Rask accidentally leaves net in tie game
snippet.description: Boston Bruins goalie Tuukka Rask skates off late in the 3rd period for an extra attacker, forgetting the game is tied and has to scramble back to the net. Rask would get the last laugh, with his Bruins defeating the New York Rangers, 3-2 in overtime

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: 'I’m not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube ► http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Support the Guardian ► https://support.theguardian.com/contribute

Today in Focus podcast ► https://www.theguardian.com/news/series/todayinfocus

snippet.title: 22.2. - 26.2.2021 | Viikon kurkistus | Salatut elämät
snippet.description:
Viikon kurkistuksessa näet tulevan viikon jaksoista herkkupaloja! Viikon kurkistus joka perjantai kello 20.00.

Tilaa Salkkareiden virallinen YouTube-kanava: https://goo.gl/KQ4Npx

Tuotanto: Fremantle Finland

Katso kokonaiset jaksot: 
https://www.mtv.fi/sarja/salatut-elamat-33005005

Katso jaksot ennakkoon C Moressa: 
https://www.cmore.fi/ohjelma/44002095/salatut-elamat

Lue uusimmat uutiset ja juonipaljastukset: 
https://www.mtvuutiset.fi/salatutelamat

Seuraa Salattuja elämiä: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MTVSalatutElamat
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mtvsalatutelamat


Salatut elämät eli Salkkarit on Suomen pitkäikäisin päivittäisdraama. Katsojat ovat saaneet seurata Pihlajakatu 23 -osoitteen monenmoisten asukkaiden värikkäitä elämänvaiheita jo 25.1.1999 alkaen MTV3-kanavalla. Sarjaa tuottaa Fremantle Finland. Salkkareita kuvataan Konalan-studiossa sekä ympäri Helsinkiä.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

About HBO Max: 
HBO Max is WarnerMedia’s direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMedia’s rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: Бортич – протесты и рок-н-ролл / вДудь
snippet.description:
Купить Вертикальный пылесос Tefal X-Force Flex в магазинах, на сайте и в мобильном приложении Эльдорадо: https://clck.ru/TLBaF

Саша Бортич https://www.instagram.com/bortich/

Фонд Шалаш https://shalash.academy/

Сидячую часть интервью мы снимали в баре Punk Fiction https://www.instagram.com/punkfiction.skatebar

Дудь https://vdudvdud.ru/


0:00 Важное заявление 
0:53 Бортич – запрещенная актриса? 
2:37 Что ей не нравится в России? 
4:06 Она была вне политики. Когда все изменилось? 
6:34 Как попадают в клип фронтмена System of a Down? 
10:06 Дудя клонировали 
13:47 Рок!
15:51 Дворец в Геленджике – Саша верит? 
16:47 Любовь   
19:31 Жыве Беларусь!
24:40 В чем уникальность Noize MC? 
26:38 Тесть Бортич – депутат «Единой России». Они обсуждают политику? 
29:09 Муж работал в администрации президента
33:37 Три лучших песни Noize MC 
34:53 Московское дело
38:42 Помощь трудным подросткам 
41:13 Бортич жестко буллили в школе. За что? 
47:37 Легенда саксофона  
52:15 Юрий будет дуть  
53:45 Нигина Сайфуллаева – режиссер, который запустил карьеру Бортич 
56:08 Самая сложная вещь в кино 
58:25 Бортич много снималась в провальных фильмах. Как так вышло?
1:02:02 Сколько. Ты. Зарабатываешь 
1:04:30 Лучший концерт в жизни 
1:07:15 Странная обложка сериала «Филфак» 
1:11:17 Бунтарский дух связан с музыкой, которую слушает Саша? 
1:14:55 «Не думала, что буду так радоваться чужим какашкам»
1:16:44 Каково потерять роль из-за беременности   
1:19:30 Какой ты представляешь себя в 30?
1:21:21 Мордюкова или Гурченко? 
1:22:25 Прекрасная Россия будущего в трех словах
1:23:37 В чем сила? 
1:23:46 КОНКУРС!

snippet.title: Mission Control Live: NASA Lands Perseverance Mars Rover (clean feed)
snippet.description:
Mission Control Live: NASA Lands Perseverance Mars Rover (clean feed)

Watch and listen as signals arrive at Mission Control at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory in Southern California from the Perseverance rover as it lands on Mars.

More Mars 2020 rover and Mars helicopter resources can be found at https://go.nasa.gov/mars2020toolkit

Credit: NASA-JPL/Caltech

snippet.title: NASA's Perseverance rover successfully lands on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch live as NASA attempts to land the Perseverance rover on Mars! Confirmation of a successful landing at Jezero Crater is expected around 3:55 pm Eastern (20:55 UTC), if everything goes to plan. The NASASpaceflight team will be providing live coverage of all of the critical events leading up to landing through to (hopefully) the first images from Perseverance on the Red Planet. 

Forum Coverage: https://forum.nasaspaceflight.com/index.php?topic=38208.0

snippet.title: Lever en dag hos Sveriges kortaste familj
snippet.description:
I det här avsnittet besöker jag några av de cirka 400 personer som är kortväxta i Sverige. Mikaela från Södertälje, paret Axengren i Jönköping och så familjen Kaptur i Sverige. I slutet festar vi dessutom till det med en person på andra änden av skalan – nämligen William som troligen är Sveriges längsta man. 

Hoppas ni gillar avsnittet!!

–––

Mauri Hermundsson, Uppdrag Mat

snippet.title: Tomi on lyönyt äitiään lapsesta asti – Perjantai-dokkari
snippet.description:
28-vuotias Tomi Kivilaakso saattaa koska tahansa raivostua ja hyökätä äitinsä Helin kimppuun. Vuosia jatkunut väkivalta on saanut Helin hetkittäin vihaamaan poikaansa.

Jos tykkäsit videosta, tilaa kanava – uusi dokkari joka perjantai.

Dokkarit julkaistaan jo maanantaisin Yle Areenassa: https://areena.yle.fi/1-4651034?utm_campaign=perjantaidokkarit

Mitä haluaisit vielä tietää juuri näkemästäsi dokkarista? Mistä aiheesta sinä haluaisit nähdä dokkarin? Kerro kommenteissa!

#yleperjantai​ #perjantaidokkari

snippet.title: Liigapelaajien ulkojääottelu! 🏒  - Red Bull Läpimurto - Jakso 21
snippet.description:
Kärppien pelaajat käyvät tiukan 2vs2 ottelun ulkojäällä. Kumpi selvii voittajana ja kuka tiputtaa hanskat? Lisäksi Aatu ja Aku kilpailevat paremmuudesta.

Jakson kertojana toimii Toni Saukkola.

Red Bull Läpimurto -sarjassa pääsemme Liigan nuorten läpimurtopelaajien iholle ja saamme nähdä kuinka urheilijat harjoittelevat, viettävät vapaa-aikaa ja kuinka heidän peliesityksensä kehittyvät kauden aikana. Tämän kauden aikana seuraamme pelaajia ympäri koko liigan.

Red Bull Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/redbullsuomi/
Red Bull Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/RedBull/ 
www.redbull.fi

Tilaa C more: https://www.cmore.fi/kampanja/liiga
C more Instagram: http://bit.ly/cmoreIG

Tässä sarjassa esiintyy pelaajia seuraavista joukkueista Kärpät, TPS, Lukko, JYP, Tappara ja Pelicans. U-20 pelaajat ovat; Aku Räty, Aatu Räty, Topi Niemelä, Kasper Puutio, Brad Lambert, Patrik Puistola, Joni Jurmo, Mikko Petman, Eemil Viro, Juuso Pärssinen, Ruben Rafkin, Matias Rajaniemi, Topias Vilen, Kasper Simontaival, Kari Piiroinen, Petteri Puhakka, Anton Lundell

snippet.title: FLY VS JERK 12 - Episode 1
snippet.description:
Ladies and gentlemen, we're happy to present to you the 12th season of FLY VS JERK. This is series where we put some of the best pike anglers  in the world to the test. This year we have 8 teams competing and they are faced with the toughest conditions in the history of this format, but as always: the toughest challenges often bring the greatest rewards.

French, German, Russian, Polish and Swedish subtitles available.

The 8 teams competing in FLY VS JERK 12 are:

CWC Fishing Team - Stefan Trumstedt & Pierre Monjarret
Vision - Niklaus Bauer & Markus Tandefelt
Leech/Gator - Alexander Lexén & Markus Maliszewski
Jiggar.nu - Björn Boström & Jakob Hanc
XL-Marin/Mercury - Lars Litzell & Pasi Taponen
Headbanger Lures - Markus Teilus & Emanuel Swärd
Sporting/Sportfiskegiganten  - Stephan Nielsen & Rikard Bergström
Raymarine/Daiwa Fishing Team - Torbjörn Odén & Pär Lindberg

This season there will be six episodes, released Fridays at 19:00 CET until the 26th of March.

Connecting the Dots on Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/album/7Ac6skYMtyfo3deEZMM1rT?si=TwberPQDTHWV-P14YH-Hig

Which team do you think will win this year?

We hope you'll enjoy this season!

/Kanalgratis

#flyvsjerk #pikefishing #kanalgratis

ru.title: FLY VS JERK 12 - Эпизод 1 (Русские субтитры)
ru.description:
Дамы и Господа, мы рады представить вам двенадцатый сезон турнира FLY vs JERK. Здесь испытают себя одни из лучших в мире по ловле щуки. В этом году участвуют восемь команд и они столкнуться с тяжелейшими условиями рыбалки за всю историю турнира, но как и всегда: через непреодолимые препятствия достигаются самые высокие результаты. 

Доступны субтитры на русском, французском, польском, шведском и немецких языках. 

Восемь команд, принимающих участие в FLY VS JERK 12: 

CWC Fishing Team - Stefan Trumstedt и Pierre Monjarret
Vision - Niklaus Bauer и Markus Tandefelt
Leech/Gator - Alexander Lexén и Markus Maliszewski
Jiggar.nu - Björn Boström и Jakob Hanc
XL-Marin/Mercury - Lars Litzell и Pasi Taponen
Headbanger Lures - Markus Teilus и Emanuel Swärd
Sporting/Sportfiskegiganten  - Stephan Nielsen и Rikard Bergström Raymarine/Daiwa Fishing Team - Torbjörn Odén и Pär Lindberg 

 В этом сезоне шесть эпизодов, которые будут выходить по пятницам в 19:00 по среднеевропейскому времени до 26 марта 2021 года.                             
Какая из команд, по вашему мнению, станет победителем?

Connecting the Dots on Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/album/7Ac6skYMtyfo3deEZMM1rT?si=TwberPQDTHWV-P14YH-Hig

Надеемся, что вам понравится этот сезон!  /Kanalgratis

#flyvsjerk​ #ловлящуки​ #kanalgratis

sv.title: FLY VS JERK 12 - Episode 1
sv.description:
Mina damer och herrar, vi är glada att kunna presentera den 12: e säsongen av FLY VS JERK. Det här är en serie där vi testar några av de bästa gäddfiskarna i världen. I år har vi 8 lag som tävlar och de står inför de tuffaste förhållandena i historiens format, men som alltid: de tuffaste utmaningarna ger ofta de största belöningarna.

Franska, tyska, ryska, polska och svenska undertexter tillgängliga.

De åtta lagen som tävlar i FLY VS JERK 12 är:

CWC Fishing Team - Stefan Trumstedt & Pierre Monjarret
Vision - Niklaus Bauer & Markus Tandefelt
Leech / Gator - Alexander Lexén & Markus Maliszewski
Jiggar.nu - Björn Boström & Jakob Hanc
XL-Marin / Mercury - Lars Litzell & Pasi Taponen
Headbanger Lures - Markus Teilus & Emanuel Swärd
Sporting / Sportfiskegiganten - Stephan Nielsen & Rikard Bergström
Raymarine / Daiwa Fishing Team - Torbjörn Odén & Pär Lindberg

Den här säsongen kommer det att finnas sex avsnitt, släppta fredagar kl 19:00 CET till den 26 mars.

Det hänger i luften / Connecting the Dots på Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/album/7Ac6skYMtyfo3deEZMM1rT?si=TwberPQDTHWV-P14YH-Hig

Vilket lag tror du vinner i år?

Vi hoppas att du kommer att njuta av den här säsongen!

/ Kanalgratis

#flyvsjerk #pikefishing #kanalgratis

de.title: FLY VS JERK 12 - Episode 1 (Deutsche Untertitel)
de.description:
Ladies und Gentlemen, wir freuen uns, euch die 12. Staffel von Fly vs. Jerk präsentieren zu können.
Bei Fly vs Jerk geht es darum, einige der besten Hechtangler der Welt an ihre Grenzen zu bringen.
Dieses Jahr kämpfen 8 Teams unter den widrigsten Bedingungen um den Sieg.
Aber wie immer gilt: mit dem Risiko steigen auch die Chancen.

Deutsche, Französische, Polnische und Schwedische Ubtertitel sind verfügbar

Die 8 Teams in FLY vs JERK stehen aus:

CWC Fishing Team - Stefan Trumstedt & Pierre Monjarret Vision - Niklaus Bauer & Markus Tandefelt
Leech/Gator - Alexander Lexén & Markus Maliszewski Jiggar.nu - Björn Boström & Jakob Hanc XL-Marin/Mercury - Lars Litzell & Pasi Taponen Headbanger Lures - Markus Teilus & Emanuel Swärd Sporting/Sportfiskegiganten - Stephan Nielsen & Rikard Bergström
Raymarine/Daiwa Fishing Team - Torbjörn Odén & Pär Lindberg

Diese Staffel wird aus 6 Folgen bestehen. Die Folgen werden bis zum 26. März jeweils freitags um
19:00 Uhr CET veröffentlicht

Connecting the Dots on Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/album/7Ac6skYMtyfo3deEZMM1rT?si=TwberPQDTHWV-P14YH-Hig

Was denkt ihr? Welches Team wird dieses Jahr gewinnen?

Wir hoffen, dass euch diese Staffel gefallen wird!

/Kanalgratis

pl.title: FLY VS JERK 12 - Episode 1 (Polskie napisy)
pl.description:
Szanowni Państwo, z przyjemnością przedstawiamy Państwu 12 sezon FLY VS JERK. To seria, w której walczą ze sobą najlepsi łowcy szczupaków na świecie. W tym roku rywalizuje 8 drużyn, które muszą stawić czoła najtrudniejszym warunkom w historii tego formatu, ale jak zawsze: najtrudniejsze wyzwania często przynoszą największe korzyści.

Dostępne napisy w języku francuskim, niemieckim, rosyjskim, polskim i szwedzkim.

8 drużyn rywalizujących w FLY VS JERK 12 to:

CWC Fishing Team - Stefan Trumstedt & Pierre Monjarret
Vision - Niklaus Bauer i Markus Tandefelt
Pijawka / Gator - Alexander Lexén i Markus Maliszewski
Jiggar.nu - Björn Boström & Jakob Hanc
XL-Marin / Mercury - Lars Litzell & Pasi Taponen
Headbanger - Markus Teilus & Emanuel Swärd
Sporting / Sportfiskegiganten - Stephan Nielsen & Rikard Bergström
Raymarine / Daiwa Fishing Team - Torbjörn Odén & Pär Lindberg

W tym sezonie będzie sześć odcinków, które zostaną wydane w piątki o 19:00 do 26 marca.

Connecting the Dots on Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/album/7Ac6skYMtyfo3deEZMM1rT?si=TwberPQDTHWV-P14YH-Hig

Jak myślicie, która drużyna wygra w tym roku?

Mamy nadzieję, że ten sezon wam się spodoba!

/ Kanalgratis

fr.title: FLY VS JERK 12 - Episode 1 (sous-titres Français)
fr.description:
Mesdames et messieurs, nous sommes heureux de vous présenter la saison 12 de FLY VS JERK. Dans cette série, nous réunissons certains des meilleurs pêcheurs de brochet au monde afin de les tester. Cette année, 8 équipes s'affronteront, et feront face aux conditions les plus difficiles de l'histoire de cette série, mais comme toujours, les challenges les plus difficiles apportent souvent les plus belles récompenses.

Sous-titres en français, allemand, russe, polonais et suédois disponibles.

Les 8 équipes participant à FLY VS JERK 12 sont :

CWC Fishing Team - Stefan Trumstedt & Pierre Monjarret
Vision - Niklaus Bauer & Markus Tandefelt
Leech/Gator - Alexander Lexén & Markus Maliszewski
Jiggar.nu - Björn Boström & Jakob Hanc
XL-Marin/Mercury - Lars Litzell & Pasi Taponen
Headbanger Lures - Markus Teilus & Emanuel Swärd
Sporting/Sportfiskegiganten - Stephan Nielsen & Rikard Bergström
Raymarine/Daiwa Fishing Team - Torbjörn Odén & Pär Lindberg 

Cette saison comprend six épisodes, qui seront mis en ligne les vendredis à 19:00 CET jusqu'au 26
Mars.

Quelle équipe va gagner cette année, à votre avis ?

Connecting the Dots on Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/album/7Ac6skYMtyfo3deEZMM1rT?si=TwberPQDTHWV-P14YH-Hig

On espère que vous apprécierez cette saison !

/Kanalgratis

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Inside Serena Williams' New Home With A Trophy Room & Art Gallery | Open Door | Architectural Digest
snippet.description:
Today AD is welcomed by tennis legend and 23-time Grand Slam singles title winner Serena Williams for a tour of her stunning new home north of Miami. After living with her sister Venus on and off for over 20 years, Serena and husband Alexis Ohanian have made a stylish new home for their family. From the eclectic artwork (including her own painting) to the world-beating trophy room, Serena’s home could only belong to someone as multifaceted and accomplished as her. “I was moving away from Venus for the first time in my life, so I wanted it to be really meaningful,” Serena says. While mixing family with business can be risky, the secret to their success as siblings and creative collaborators is simple: “You have to know your lane. I’m really good at playing tennis; I’m not as good at interiors. But I was able to learn through just watching Venus.” 

--
Select artwork by:
KAWS and Estudio Campana
KAWS Chair Pink
2018

Plush toys, stainless steel, Cumaru wood
36 x 50 x 40 inches
RADCLIFFE BAILEY
Monument for a Promise, 2013

steel, concrete, cotton, and trunk
70 x 30 x 18 inches
© Radcliffe Bailey. Courtesy of the artist and Jack Shainman Gallery, New York.
Astro Black, 2018

mixed media
140 x 115 x 28 1/2 inches
© Radcliffe Bailey. Courtesy of the artist and Jack Shainman Gallery, New York.
Leonardo Drew, Number 184, 2016 © Leonardo Drew, Courtesy Galerie Lelong & Co.

Art by David Kracov with the courtesy of Eden Gallery.

snippet.title: YouTubers have to declare ads. Why doesn't anyone else?
snippet.description:
Around the world, there are regulations for "influencers". Those regulations make sure that if someone is paid to endorse a product, they have to declare that payment to the people watching. But why does no-one on TV, or film, or anywhere else have to do that?

👥👥 CREDITS 👥👥

Written and performed by TOM SCOTT https://www.tomscott.com/
Script assistant ANDREA MARKS
Animation BILLY CRINION https://twitter.com/BillyCrinion and WILLIAM MARLER https://wmad.co.uk
Dubbing mixer GRAHAM HAERTHER

"Does the Spearmint Lose Its Flavor on the Bedpost Overnight" by Rose/Broom/Breuer (1924), arranged for orchestra by BENJAMIN SQUIRES https://www.benjaminsquires.co.uk/

Thanks to EVAN EDINGER, JESSICA ENDOYAN, CHRISTINA HERNANDEZ, the TINY SPECK team, and SAM VALIANT

Filmed safely: https://www.tomscott.com/safe/

© Pad 26 Limited MMXXI

📄📄 SOURCES 📄📄

💵 PAYMENT AND CONTROL
Lonnie Donegan changing Spearmint: mentioned in a lot of places, but I can't find a contemporary account.
Ray Davies flying: https://twitter.com/thekinks/status/1265203792754212864 and https://www.cbc.ca/radio/undertheinfluence/why-ray-davies-flew-26-000-km-to-save-lola-1.5009086
BBC trademark policy: https://www.bbc.co.uk/programmes/articles/5R152hTbVPQdYjn29q5jt4/16-songs-banned-by-the-bbc
Pitbull and Kodak: https://twitter.com/pitbull/status/16567622829080576
Pitbull and Voli: https://voli305vodka.com/ "Owned and operated by Armando Christian Perez, aka Pitbull"
Gucci on Lil Pump: no quotes, but given the lyrics and video, it's safe to say they didn't have control
YMCA reaction: https://news.google.com/newspapers?nid=1346&dat=19790329&id=M3VRAAAAIBAJ&sjid=uPoDAAAAIBAJ&pg=7192,10172867

✔️ YOU HAVE TO DECLARE IT
US Code Title 15: https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/15
Nikkie de Jager, One Dip Makeup Challenge: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CA18hTShwpk
Disclosures 101 for Social Media Influencers [PDF]: https://www.ftc.gov/system/files/documents/plain-language/1001a-influencer-guide-508_1.pdf
An Influencer’s Guide to making clear that ads are ads [PDF]: https://www.asa.org.uk/uploads/assets/uploaded/3af39c72-76e1-4a59-b2b47e81a034cd1d.pdf
The FTC’s Endorsement Guides: What People Are Asking: https://www.ftc.gov/tips-advice/business-center/guidance/ftcs-endorsement-guides-what-people-are-asking
YouTube declaration: https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/154235

❌ NO-ONE ELSE HAS TO DECLARE IT
McFlurry: https://adage.com/article/adages/30-rock-mcflurry-scene-paid-placement/134689
Snapple: https://www.reuters.com/article/us-30rock-idUSN2833828120071128
"Branded content pods": https://adage.com/article/media/snl-air-fewer-commercials-season/303697
Farrow and Ball: https://www.bournemouthecho.co.uk/news/18014632.saturday-night-live-sketch-features-farrow-ball/
Branson cameo: https://www.cinemablend.com/pop/Branson-s-Bond-Cameo-Was-Bought-1558.html
Superman's $40,000: https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1989-03-08-ca-322-story.html
Bond placement: https://www.bbc.com/culture/article/20151001-does-bonds-product-placement-go-too-far
Lorraine Kelly's tax bill: https://www.theguardian.com/business/2019/mar/20/lorraine-kelly-theatrical-artist-tax-tribunal-judge-rules

🎢 WE'RE GOING TO DISNEY WORLD
"Moms' conference": https://www.5minutesformom.com/disneysmmoms/
SNT viewing figures: https://www.eveningexpress.co.uk/lifestyle/entertainment/saturday-night-takeaway-smashes-ratings-record-after-airing-without-audience/
"19 years in a row": https://www.chroniclelive.co.uk/news/tv/ant--dec-win-best-17648154
"Can't find any other example" of the castle being covered: https://www.disboards.com/threads/ant-and-dec-tv-show-live-from-magic-kingdom-in-april.3581535/
Ofcom on product placement in UK TV: https://www.ofcom.org.uk/tv-radio-and-on-demand/advice-for-consumers/television/product-placement-on-tv
"One article on a tabloid web site": https://www.thesun.co.uk/tvandshowbiz/10841854/ant-and-dec-trademark-name/

🇺🇸 THE LAND OF THE FREE 🇺🇸
FCC, "The FCC and Freedom of Speech": https://www.fcc.gov/consumers/guides/fcc-and-freedom-speech
US Bill of Rights: https://www.archives.gov/founding-docs/bill-of-rights
First Amendment exceptions: fact-checked by legal experts, but best summarised on Wikipedia: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/First_Amendment_to_the_United_States_Constitution
Commercial speech: https://www.mtsu.edu/first-amendment/article/900/commercial-speech
Communications Act 2003: https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/2003/21/contents
Animal Defenders International v United Kingdom: https://hudoc.echr.coe.int/fre?i=001-119244
CMA, "Social media endorsements: being transparent with your followers": https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/social-media-endorsements-guide-for-influencers/
German product placement: https://www.grin.com/document/417399

📕 CHAPTERS 📕

00:00 Intro
00:58 1. Payment and Control
05:47 2. You Have To Declare It
09:17 3. No-One Else Has To Declare It
18:03 4. We're Going To Disney World
24:47 5. The Land Of The Free
31:15 Outro

en.title: YouTubers have to declare ads. Why doesn't anyone else?
en.description:
Around the world, there are regulations for "influencers". Those regulations make sure that if someone is paid to endorse a product, they have to declare that payment to the people watching. But why does no-one on TV, or film, or anywhere else have to do that?

👥👥 CREDITS 👥👥

Written and performed by TOM SCOTT https://www.tomscott.com/
Script assistant ANDREA MARKS
Animation BILLY CRINION https://twitter.com/BillyCrinion and WILLIAM MARLER https://wmad.co.uk
Dubbing mixer GRAHAM HAERTHER

"Does the Spearmint Lose Its Flavor on the Bedpost Overnight" by Rose/Broom/Breuer (1924), arranged for orchestra by BENJAMIN SQUIRES https://www.benjaminsquires.co.uk/

Thanks to EVAN EDINGER, JESSICA ENDOYAN, CHRISTINA HERNANDEZ, the TINY SPECK team, and SAM VALIANT

Filmed safely: https://www.tomscott.com/safe/

© Pad 26 Limited MMXXI

📄📄 SOURCES 📄📄

💵 PAYMENT AND CONTROL
Lonnie Donegan changing Spearmint: mentioned in a lot of places, but I can't find a contemporary account.
Ray Davies flying: https://twitter.com/thekinks/status/1265203792754212864 and https://www.cbc.ca/radio/undertheinfluence/why-ray-davies-flew-26-000-km-to-save-lola-1.5009086
BBC trademark policy: https://www.bbc.co.uk/programmes/articles/5R152hTbVPQdYjn29q5jt4/16-songs-banned-by-the-bbc
Pitbull and Kodak: https://twitter.com/pitbull/status/16567622829080576
Pitbull and Voli: https://voli305vodka.com/ "Owned and operated by Armando Christian Perez, aka Pitbull"
Gucci on Lil Pump: no quotes, but given the lyrics and video, it's safe to say they didn't have control
YMCA reaction: https://news.google.com/newspapers?nid=1346&dat=19790329&id=M3VRAAAAIBAJ&sjid=uPoDAAAAIBAJ&pg=7192,10172867

✔️ YOU HAVE TO DECLARE IT
US Code Title 15: https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/15
Nikkie de Jager, One Dip Makeup Challenge: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CA18hTShwpk
Disclosures 101 for Social Media Influencers [PDF]: https://www.ftc.gov/system/files/documents/plain-language/1001a-influencer-guide-508_1.pdf
An Influencer’s Guide to making clear that ads are ads [PDF]: https://www.asa.org.uk/uploads/assets/uploaded/3af39c72-76e1-4a59-b2b47e81a034cd1d.pdf
The FTC’s Endorsement Guides: What People Are Asking: https://www.ftc.gov/tips-advice/business-center/guidance/ftcs-endorsement-guides-what-people-are-asking
YouTube declaration: https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/154235

❌ NO-ONE ELSE HAS TO DECLARE IT
McFlurry: https://adage.com/article/adages/30-rock-mcflurry-scene-paid-placement/134689
Snapple: https://www.reuters.com/article/us-30rock-idUSN2833828120071128
"Branded content pods": https://adage.com/article/media/snl-air-fewer-commercials-season/303697
Farrow and Ball: https://www.bournemouthecho.co.uk/news/18014632.saturday-night-live-sketch-features-farrow-ball/
Branson cameo: https://www.cinemablend.com/pop/Branson-s-Bond-Cameo-Was-Bought-1558.html
Superman's $40,000: https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1989-03-08-ca-322-story.html
Bond placement: https://www.bbc.com/culture/article/20151001-does-bonds-product-placement-go-too-far
Lorraine Kelly's tax bill: https://www.theguardian.com/business/2019/mar/20/lorraine-kelly-theatrical-artist-tax-tribunal-judge-rules

🎢 WE'RE GOING TO DISNEY WORLD

🇺🇸 THE LAND OF THE FREE 🇺🇸

snippet.title: FIRST TO FINISH ART SCHOOL WINS || Drawing Challenge! Funny Painting Handmade by 123 GO! SCHOOL
snippet.description:
I heard there’s a special place where all magical beings roam free!
Wouldn’t you die to meet a real live unicorn?!

You’ll love this challenge even more!
Ready to draw?

Ever wish you could meet a real unicorn? 
At least you can draw one! 
Why don’t you hold your own drawing contest with your friends!
Let us know who wins! 

Watch these yet? Subscribe to 123 GO! SCHOOL so you never miss out on the fun! 

#123go #drawing #challenge

Music by Epidemic Sound: https://www.epidemicsound.com/

Stock materials:
https://www.depositphotos.com
https://www.shutterstock.com
https://elements.envato.com

snippet.title: Kokkaillaan Amerikkalaiset Chili Hodarit!
snippet.description:
Video on toteutettu kaupallisessa yhteistyössä Snellmanin kanssa

Chili:
1 keskikokoinen sipuli
2 valkosipulin kynttä
1 chili
1 purkki tomaattimurskaa ( paloina )

snippet.title: ЦРУ, Ротенберг и ёршик. Как пропагандисты отмазывают Путина
snippet.description:
Последние пару недель на федеральном телевидении творятся удивительные чудеса. Алексей Навальный превратился из человека, имя которого нельзя произносить, в главную тему для обсуждения в каждом политическом шоу. 

Что произошло? Пали оковы цензуры? Не совсем. 

Согласно опросу “Левады”, наш фильм “Дворец для Путина” посмотрел каждый четвертый россиянин. Почти 70%  - либо видели сами, либо знают о нем. А это значит, что мы с вами победили телевизор. Наша аудитория стала слишком большой, чтобы ее не замечать. 

Специально для вас мы окунулись в пучину государственной пропаганды. Этот мужественный поступок мы совершили с одной целью: чтобы разоблачить ложь телевизионных пропагандистов и вооружить вас лучшим оружием - правдой. 

Покажите наш фильм “Дворец для Путина” всем, кто мог его пропустить. Отправьте ссылку еще раз, не ленитесь. Это работает.
https://youtu.be/ipAnwilMncI

Твиттер Марии Певчих — https://twitter.com/pevchikh
Блог Алексея Навального https://navalny.com/
Инстаграм Алексея Навального — https://www.instagram.com/navalny/
Фейсбук — https://www.facebook.com/navalny/
Вконтакте — https://vk.com/navalny

snippet.title: Дворец для Путина. История самой большой взятки
snippet.description:
Текст расследования со всеми документами здесь https://palace.navalny.com/

Это видео Навальный записал до своего возвращения в Россию, но мы сразу договорились, что выпустим его после: Алексей не хотел, чтобы главный герой этого расследования – Владимир Путин – думал, что мы его боимся и о его самом большом секрете рассказываем из-за границы.

Сегодня вы увидите то, что считается невозможным увидеть вблизи. Вместе с нами зайдете туда, куда никого не пускают. Мы попадем в гости к Путину. Своими глазами убедимся в том, что этот человек в своей тяге к роскоши, к богатству спятил совершенно. Узнаем, чьими деньгами и как финансируется эта роскошь. И как в течение последних 15 лет дается самая большая взятка в истории и строится самый дорогой в мире дворец. 

Алексей был задержан в аэропорту, куда прилетел после 5-месячного лечения в Германии. Там он оказался после того, как Путин попытался его убить. 18 января Навальный был незаконно арестован и помещен в СИЗО.

Алексей всегда борется за наши права, а теперь мы должны побороться за его. Владимир Путин обязан ответить за все свои преступления.

23 января в 14:00 выходите на центральные улицы ваших городов. Не оставайтесь в стороне.
Ссылка на митинги в разных городах здесь (пост будет обновляться): https://navalny.com/p/6454/

Поддержите нас: https://fbk.info/donate

Регистрируйтесь в «Умном голосовании»: https://votesmart.appspot.com/

9:45 Молодой Путин, Бандитский Ленинград и первые крупные взятки
13:41 Как Лёша Миллер принимал конверты с деньгами
16:59 МОСКВА
19:24 Письма Людмилы Путиной 
22:19 Как Владимир Владимирович с Игорем Ивановичем поссорились
24:40 Путин спасает Ельцинскую Семью
25:50 ДВОРЕЦ
30:40 Пролёт над Дворцом Путина 🏰

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceX’s second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

pl.title: Ilu ludzi zabiła energia jądrowa? Liczba zmarłych z powodu atomu
pl.description:
Pierwsze 1000 osób, które użyją tego linku, otrzyma darmowy okres próbny na Skillshare:
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell01211

Żródła i dalsza lektura:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-nuclear-death-toll/

Energia atomowa u wielu osób wywołuje uczucia niepokoju i zagrożenia. Koncentrujemy prastare i niebezpieczne minerały, aby uwolnić nienaturalne z pozoru moce. W procesie tym wytwarzamy trujące substancje, które - jeśli wyciekną do środowiska - powodują śmierć mnóstwa ludzi w męczarniach. Ile osób zabiła energia jądrowa i w jaki sposób?

snippet.title: Danny - Sinä päivänä kun kaikki rakastaa mua (Lyric Video) // UMK21
snippet.description:
Danny osallistuu Uuden Musiikin Kilpailuun 2021 biisillä Sinä päivänä kun kaikki rakastaa mua. Kaikki päättyy aikanaan, mutta Dannyn jäähyväisbiisistä ei ole kyse.

UMK-finaalissa lauantaina 20.2. Tampereen Mediapoliksessa valitaan vuoden 2021 euroviisuedustaja. Kilpailu lähetetään suorana Yle TV1:llä, Yle Areenassa, Yle Radio Suomessa ja Yle X3M:ltä.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

snippet.title: I am so confused.
snippet.description:
Schlatt wonders why his last video got 80,000 comments.

Follow me on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/jschlatt

Follow me on Instagram:
https://instagram.com/jschlatt

Truly disgusting, that some people would do this horrible thing. Why? Why did you comment this? Are you part of the problem? No, I'll tell you what the problem is. The problem is that TommyInnit and the Dream SMP are getting more viewers than me even though I'm so much cooler than everyone else on it (like Ranboo, Awesamdude, Karl Jacobs, and others whose names I forgot). Tubbo is pretty cool I guess though. Schlatt talks about why his latest video got 80,000 comments, which is insane and almost seems like algorithm manipulation (CC: Spiffing Brit). Almost as bad as the algorithm manipulation that writing these meaningless paragraphs contributes to. But hey I'm in it for the money. ToaLegend makes an appearance as well, with his hit classic "Nibble" which will now get millions of comments I bet. Please be nice.

snippet.title: Spot's Got an Arm!
snippet.description: Now that Spot has an arm in addition to legs and cameras, it can do mobile manipulation.  It finds and picks up objects (trash), tidies up the living room, opens doors, operates switches and valves, tends the garden, and generally has fun.  Motion of the hand, arm and body are automatically coordinated to simplify manipulation tasks and expand the arm's workspace, making its reach essentially unbounded.  The behavior shown here was programmed using a new API for mobile manipulation that supports autonomy and user applications, as well as a tablet that lets users do remote operations.  For more information, visit https://www.bostondynamics.com/spot-arm.

snippet.title: Sketsihahmokilpailu: Folke Rundqvist | 2. live | Putous 13. kausi | MTV3
snippet.description:
Voit katsoa #Putous-jaksot ilmaiseksi milloin vain mtv-palvelussa:
https://www.mtv.fi/sarja/putous-33006172

Lauantai-iltoja vauhdittavat 16.1.2021 alkaen klo 19.30 Christoffer Strandberg, Maaria Nuoranne, Antti Tuomas Heikkinen, Pilvi Hämäläinen, Aija Pahkala, Mikko Töyssy, Heikki Ranta ja Dennis Nylund.
